researchResults.title: SquareMind raises $18M for robotic dermatology platform
researchResults.description:
Squaremind has raised funding to launch Swan, a robotic platform that automates full-body skin imaging for early cancer detection.

The post SquareMind raises $18M for robotic dermatology platform appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Learn about the latest advances in physical AI at the Robotics Summit
researchResults.description:
The Robotics Summit & Expo will have an entire track of sessions focusing on how to apply artificial intelligence to robotics.

The post Learn about the latest advances in physical AI at the Robotics Summit appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Sereact gets Series B funding to expand Cortex 2.0 robot brain, enter U.S. market
researchResults.description:
Sereact plans to expand Cortex 2.0 from bin picking to tasks such as assembly and kitting, and it is opening a Boston office.

The post Sereact gets Series B funding to expand Cortex 2.0 robot brain, enter U.S. market appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Look back on 10 years of legged robots with Ghost Robotics at the Robotics Summit
researchResults.description:
At the summit, Gavin Kenneally, CEO and co-founder of Ghost Robotics, will share lessons from 10 years of deploying quadruped robots.

The post Look back on 10 years of legged robots with Ghost Robotics at the Robotics Summit appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: ABB Robotics launches PoWa cobot family targeting industrial tasks
researchResults.description:
ABB Robotics said its new PoWa family of cobots addresses a long‑standing gap in the market between traditional cobots.

The post ABB Robotics launches PoWa cobot family targeting industrial tasks appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
researchResults.description: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

researchResults.title: China blocks Meta’s $2B Manus deal after months-long probe
researchResults.description: China has ordered Meta to unwind its multibillion-dollar Manus acquisition, dealing a potential setback to Zuckerberg’s push into AI agents.

researchResults.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
researchResults.description: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

researchResults.title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
researchResults.description: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

researchResults.title: OpenAI could be making a phone with AI agents replacing apps
researchResults.description: There have been plenty of rumors about OpenAI's hardware plans, which involve launching a pair of earbuds. A new note from industry analyst Ming-Chi Kuo suggests that the AI company might be working on a phone in collaboration with MediaTek, Qualcomm, and Luxshare.
